metadata.description: UESTC 电子科技大学学术报告/论文文档自动生成框架 — 中期/后期报告模板、Mermaid图渲染、C/C++/Python源码提取、7种语言代码高亮

plugins.name: uestc-doc
plugins.description: Generate professional .docx academic reports for UESTC software engineering coursework. Supports midterm (3-chapter) and final (4-chapter) report formats with parameterized templates, Mermaid diagram rendering, C/C++/Python source extraction, and syntax highlighting for 7 languages (C/C++, Python, LLVM IR, RISC-V, ARM, x86, Bash).
